text: Last class you said I wear a jacket and I need new boots.
You wake up in the morning. What time do you get up?
Get up
Have a shower
Brush my teeth
Go to work
Come home
Have dinner
Go to bed
Seven o'clock
What time is it? It is seven o'clock.
I get up at seven o'clock.
What time do you go to work?
I have dinner at eight o'clock.
Good morning, Gabriela. You always look ready. What time do you get up?
I get up at seven o'clock. First I have a shower. And you?
I get up late, at eight. What time do you go to work?
I go to work at eight too. Then I come home at six o'clock.
Nice. And what time do you go to bed?
I have dinner at eight and go to bed at eleven. Have a good day!
I come home at six o'clock.
What time is it?
I go to bed at eleven o'clock.

Hi, I am Gabriela, and this is my daily routine. On weekdays I get up at seven o'clock. First I have a shower and I brush my teeth. Then I have breakfast at half past seven, with coffee and bread. I go to work at eight o'clock, and I work at the bank all morning. At noon I have lunch with my friends. I come home at six o'clock in the evening, and I have dinner at eight. After dinner I read a book, and I go to bed at eleven o'clock. I love my quiet evenings at home. What time do you go to bed?

Good morning, this is Daniel from the front desk with the daily office schedule. The doors open at seven o'clock. The morning meeting starts at nine, so please get to your desk before that. We have a coffee break at half past ten. Lunch is from twelve to one o'clock in the staff room. The afternoon meeting begins at three, and the office closes at six o'clock in the evening. Have a wonderful and productive day, everyone.

Gabriela gets up at seven o'clock in the morning. First she has a shower and brushes her teeth. Then she has breakfast and goes to work at eight. She comes home in the evening and has dinner with her family. Finally, she reads a book and goes to bed at eleven o'clock.
Get up
Have a shower
Brush my teeth
Go to work
Come home
Have dinner
Go to bed
Seven o'clock
I get up at seven o'clock.
What time is it?
It is seven o'clock.
I have dinner at eight o'clock.
I go to bed at eleven o'clock.
What time do you go to work?
I come home at six o'clock.
